title: Stop Ignoring Asset Depletion: That Retiree is Money in the Bank
subtitle: Unlock the potential of asset depletion with retirees in your pipeline. Transform liquid assets into qualifying income and close more loans.
keyTakeaways: Identify retirees with high liquid assets and low income.
Utilize 36/60-month lookback periods for asset calculation.
Gather CPA letters or detailed account statements to verify assets.
Price and compare scenarios in PRO Portal for optimal solutions.
Submit Non-QM asset depletion loans to enhance your closing rate.

sections.heading: Understand Asset Depletion Opportunities
sections.body: Many brokers overlook the potential of asset depletion in the Non-QM space. By focusing on retirees with substantial assets but minimal income, you can convert these assets into qualifying income and capture more business.
bullets: Focus on liquid assets like cash, stocks, bonds, IRA, and 401k.
Avoid relying solely on traditional income documentation.

sections.heading: Steps to Convert Assets into Income
sections.body: Follow a structured approach to turn dormant assets into a qualifying income stream. This involves calculating potential income, verifying assets, and using the right tools to price and submit loans.
bullets: Calculate income using 36 or 60-month lookback periods.
Obtain CPA verification letters or compile detailed account statements.

sections.heading: Execute with Confidence using PRO Portal
sections.body: Leverage PRO Portal to price, lock, and submit your Non-QM asset depletion scenarios. Compare with conventional options to find the best fit for your clients.
bullets: Price the scenario in PRO Portal with real-time updates.
Submit your loan to transition from denial to approval.

metaDescription: Convert retiree assets into income with Non-QM asset depletion. Boost your pipeline with UFF's strategic guidance.
